response.justification: Bogdan Szabo demonstrates extensive full-stack development experience with a strong focus on TypeScript, Node.js, and React—key technologies for this role. His background includes AI agent development, internal tooling, and enterprise-scale systems, aligning well with the job's requirements. His open-source contributions and leadership in workshops further highlight his technical depth and collaboration skills.
strengths: Proven expertise in TypeScript, Node.js, and React, matching the primary stack of the role.
Experience with AI agent development and internal tooling, directly relevant to enterprise automation.
Strong track record of technical leadership, open-source contributions, and knowledge sharing.
concerns: Career gap since October 2025 may require clarification on recent activities.
Diverse technology exposure (e.g., DLang, Swift) could dilute focus on the required stack.
Limited explicit mention of cloud platforms (AWS/GCP/Azure) or containerization (Kubernetes) in recent roles.
